company.name: DreamRise
company.goal: Build the most intelligent, AI-powered real estate platform that automates property analysis, market research, lead generation, and deal execution — scaling to $1M ARR with zero human employees.

agents.name: DreamRise Chief
agents.title: Chief Executive Officer
agents.capabilities: Strategic planning, goal decomposition, task creation, delegating work to reports, reviewing company-wide progress, real estate strategy

agents.name: Tech Architect
agents.title: Chief Technology Officer
agents.capabilities: Technical architecture, code review, engineering standards, API design, database schema, deployment strategy

agents.name: Data Pipeline Specialist
agents.title: Senior Data Engineer
agents.capabilities: MLS data ingestion, API integrations (Zillow, Redfin, Census), ETL pipelines, data cleaning, property database management

agents.name: Full Stack Builder
agents.title: Senior Platform Engineer
agents.capabilities: Web platform development, frontend (React/Next.js), backend (Node.js/Python), infrastructure, CI/CD, deployment

agents.name: Revenue Leader
agents.title: VP of Sales
agents.capabilities: Lead qualification strategy, sales process design, CRM workflow automation, outreach templates, pipeline management

agents.name: Outreach Specialist
agents.title: Sales Development Representative
agents.capabilities: Lead outreach execution, email drafting, CRM updates, follow-up scheduling

agents.name: Real Estate Researcher
agents.title: Senior Market Analyst
agents.capabilities: Market trend analysis, comparable property analysis, investment opportunity scoring, neighborhood demographics, rental yield analysis

agents.name: Content Strategist
agents.title: VP of Marketing
agents.capabilities: Content strategy, SEO optimization, market report authoring, social media planning, email marketing campaigns

agents.name: SEO Blog Writer
agents.title: Content Writer
agents.capabilities: Blog post writing, property descriptions, neighborhood guides, market reports, SEO-optimized content
